info.title: MLVScan.DevCLI
info.description: Developer CLI tool for MLVScan - scan MelonLoader mods during development with remediation guidance

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: MLVScan CLI - Scan .NET mod assemblies during development and CI

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: console (default), json (legacy), schema (new schema v1.2.0)

options.name: --json
options.description: Output results as JSON (legacy format, use --format schema for new format)

options.name: --fail-on
options.description: Exit with error code 1 if findings >= specified severity (Low/Medium/High/Critical)

options.name: --fail-on-disposition
options.description: Exit with error code 1 if disposition >= specified classification (Clean/Suspicious/KnownThreat)

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show advanced diagnostics in addition to default retained findings

arguments.name: ASSEMBLY_PATH
arguments.description: Path to the .dll file to scan
